consent_items.title: Confirming the Results of the November 5, 2024, General Municipal Election
consent_items.recommendation:
1. Adopt a Resolution:
a) Confirming the results of the November 5, 2024, General Municipal Election; and
b) Declaring the passage of Measure W – Real Property Transfer Tax Amendments, Measure X – Library Relief Act of 2024, Measure Y – Parks, Trees, and Landscaping Maintenance Tax Amendments , Measure Z – Sugar Sweetened Beverage Tax Amendments, Measure AA – Article XIIIB GANN Appropriations Limit Authority, Measure BB – Rent Stabilization Ordinance Amendments and Housing Retention Measure DD –
